# Mytradelink

> Mytradelink is a dead-simple digital profile page builder for tradespeople (plumbers, electricians, builders, handymen and other trades). It gives a tradie one shareable link that shows their work, trust badges, and big Call and WhatsApp buttons, so customers can hire them in one tap. Think Linktree, built for tradies. Mobile-first, no website needed, set up in minutes.

Mytradelink is built for Australian and UK tradespeople who want to look professional and win more work without building a website. A free plan gives a public profile page; a Pro plan (A$15/month or A$149/year) adds a quote request form, emergency callout button, intro video, and email alerts on every quote.

We also publish free tools and plain-English guides for tradies on pricing, quoting, tax, getting paid, and getting found. These are written to answer the exact questions tradies ask, with real numbers and clear rules.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://mytradelink.page): What Mytradelink is and how to create a profile.
- [Pricing](https://mytradelink.page/pricing): Free vs Pro plans, features and cost. Machine-readable version at /pricing.md.
- [Free tools](https://mytradelink.page/tools): Free calculators and generators for Australian tradies.
- [Guides](https://mytradelink.page/blog): Plain-English guides on tax, quotes, rates, getting paid and getting found.
- [Sign up](https://mytradelink.page/sign-up): Create a free profile page.

## Free tools
- [Tax Invoice Generator](https://mytradelink.page/tools/tax-invoice-generator): Make an ATO-compliant tax invoice in under a minute.
- [Quote Template](https://mytradelink.page/tools/quote-template): Send professional quotes that win jobs.
- [Charge-Out Rate Calculator](https://mytradelink.page/tools/charge-out-rate-calculator): Work out what to charge per hour, covering costs, super and profit.
- [Job Sheet Generator](https://mytradelink.page/tools/job-sheet-generator): Capture site, scope, materials and customer sign-off.
- [Tradie Tax Calculator](https://mytradelink.page/tools/tradie-tax-calculator): Estimate income tax and GST to set aside as a sole trader.

- [Should tradies charge for quotes?](https://mytradelink.page/blog/should-tradies-charge-for-quotes)
